Creator and technology

Credits and licenses

Paper Flock production release · v1.0

Creation

Paper Flock was designed and developed by the publisher named in the production configuration. Configure publisherName before release.

Technology

The runtime uses standards-based HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Web Audio, local browser storage, service workers, and the Web App Manifest.

Runtime dependencies

The game has no third-party runtime package or advertising SDK. Playwright and Lighthouse CI are development-only quality tools and are not shipped to players.

Art and audio

The current origami artwork, interface assets, and synthesized audio are contained in the project. Review ownership and licensing before replacing them with external assets.
